text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's one of those cold and windy December days
where you can see your breath hanging wispily in
the air in front of you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Out of nowhere, I receive an invitation from Air
Groove requesting a meeting in my office.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wondering what she wants, I hurry over to find...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: My office has been completely transformed.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Happy Holidays!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. That flabbergasted look tells me you've
forgotten what day it is.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's true that I'm taken aback—not least because
of Air Groove's sudden joyous cheer—but also...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Yes, this morning. It's not perfect, but I believe
this should suffice.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I didn't just decorate. I've also prepared dinner
and a cake.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Tis the season, after all. It doesn't feel right to let
this time of year pass without a proper
celebration.
choice_data_list: I feel bad you had to do all this by yourself.
I feel bad you had to do all this by yourself.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Spare me your sympathy. I did this of my own
volition.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Besides, I thought it would be a good opportunity
to celebrate all of our hard work.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
It occurred to me that we hadn't properly
commemorated any of our victories thus far.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I thought we could reflect on the year and be
proud of what we've accomplished.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: That seems more our style, wouldn't you agree?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
So consider this a victory party and holiday
festivity in one—and don't you dare think about
doing any more work today.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Before we start, there's something very important
I'm still waiting to hear from you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Surely you know what it is?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Very good.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Again, Happy Holidays to you too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As we feast, Air Groove and I reflect on the past
year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looking back, it was quite a fulfilling one. I'm
happy we have the chance to sit down and look
back.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As we feast, Air Groove and I reflect on the past
year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're having so much fun that time is flying by.
Just as our merriment is reaching its peak...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Trainer, this is for you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
A token of my appreciation for all of your hard
work. And of course, it's also a present befitting
the season.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: By all means.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I unwrap the package to find a leather-bound
planner inside.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I'm glad you like it. I picked it out just for you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Open it to the calendar pages.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I open the planner to find a huge number of
important details already penned in on many of
the dates inside. From holidays to scheduled
races—it's all there.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You seem incapable of remembering these things,
so I thought it would help you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I hope you can put it to good use and keep up
the good work in the coming year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure I can use this planner to ensure that next
year will be a very productive one for the both of
us.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We spend the rest of the evening together,
enveloped by warm feelings and plentiful mirth.
